prompt:
Declaration (in prose format):

Build a CI/CD pipeline for the backend-api project, triggered on push to
main. In parallel, run: a Go linter, a Go type checker, the ginkgo test
framework with minimum 80% coverage, and a snyk security scan. If all four
pass, build a docker image and push it to ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api,
then deploy it to staging using a rolling strategy, then smoke test with
a 60-second timeout. If the smoke test passes, deploy to production using
a canary strategy at 10%. If any of the initial four checks fail, notify
#deploys in Slack and block the merge.

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- Pipeline name: CI/CD pipeline for backend-api
- Trigger: push to branch main
- Parallel job 1: Go linter
- Parallel job 2: Go type checker
- Parallel job 3: Ginkgo test framework execution
- Parallel job 3 parameter: minimum 80% code coverage threshold enforced
- Parallel job 4: Snyk security scan
- All four parallel jobs run concurrently (not sequentially)
- Gate condition: all four parallel jobs must pass before proceeding
- On gate pass: build Docker image
- Docker image registry: ghcr.io
- Docker image repository path: ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api
- On gate pass: push Docker image to ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api
- Post-push action: deploy to staging environment
- Staging deployment strategy: rolling
- Post-staging action: run smoke tests against staging
- Smoke test timeout: 60 seconds
- Gate condition: smoke test must pass before proceeding to production
- On smoke test pass: deploy to production environment
- Production deployment strategy: canary
- Canary initial traffic split: 10%
- On any of the four parallel checks failing: send Slack notification
- Slack notification destination: #deploys channel
- On any of the four parallel checks failing: block the merge
- Docker image build occurs only after all four checks pass (not before)
- Staging deployment occurs only after Docker image is pushed
- Production deployment occurs only after smoke test passes
- Smoke test is executed against staging (not production)
